title: 2020 AMC 10B Problems/Problem 3
problem: The ratio of $w$ to $x$ is $4:3$ , the ratio of $y$ to $z$ is $3:2$ , and the ratio of $z$ to $x$ is $1:6$ . What is the ratio of $w$ to $y?$ $\textbf{(A)}\ 4:3 \qquad\textbf{(B)}\ 3:2 \qquad\textbf{(C)}\ 8:3 \qquad\textbf{(D)}\ 4:1 \qquad\textbf{(E)}\ 16:3$
solution: We have \[\frac wy = \frac wx \cdot \frac xz \cdot \frac zy = \frac43\cdot\frac61\cdot\frac23=\frac{16}{3},\] from which $w:y=\boxed{\textbf{(E)}\ 16:3}.$ ~MRENTHUSIASM
